goal: Enrich game agent behavior with tiered idle detection, expanded status/interaction icon mappings, and refined wandering behaviors

risks: AgentStatus is a union type used across 6+ files (pixel-types.ts, types.ts, GamePage.tsx, renderer.ts, officeState.ts, characters.ts). Widening from 'working'|'idle' to include tiered idle states requires careful pass through all consumers — a missed file = type error or silent status loss.

Idle time thresholds depend on sessionInfo.lastActivityMs which is derived from session.lastActivity in GamePage.tsx. If sessions lack lastActivity timestamps (e.g. old sessions), agents may incorrectly show as long-idle. Must handle missing/undefined gracefully.

Wandering behavior already works at the 30min boundary. Changing to tiered (stay-at-desk < 10min, occasional-wander 10-30min, full-wander > 30min) requires splitting the shouldWander() binary into a 3-state function and updating the IDLE case FSM logic in characters.ts — this is the highest-complexity change.
over_engineering_flags: Design spec (task 1) is useful but scope is narrow — the emoji maps and threshold constants are self-documenting. Keep the design doc lightweight: a table mapping statuses/actions to emoji + colors, threshold values, and wandering rules. Not a full UX deliverable.

No need for custom pixel-art status icons — existing emoji-in-pill system works well and was deliberately chosen over pixel sprites. Enrichment = more emoji mappings + better idle state differentiation, not a rendering system change.
challenges.recommendation: Proceed. Single project, 4 sequential tasks. The design task is lightweight (table spec), not a full UX exploration. Implementation tasks are well-bounded to 2 files each. Key risk mitigation: task 2 handles type widening first so tasks 3-4 build on stable types.

projects.title: Agent Behavior Enrichment — Status Icons, Idle Tiers, Wandering
projects.scope_summary: Design mapping spec for all status/interaction/idle visual treatments, then implement: (1) expand AgentStatus with tiered idle states + new session status mappings + dot/emoji colors per status, (2) tiered wandering behavior (desk < 10min, occasional-wander 10-30min, full-wander > 30min), (3) interaction action emoji icons verified complete for all pipeline steps. All changes are frontend-only within the game engine.
projects.tasks_summary: 4 tasks: (1) design mapping spec, (2) implement status enrichment + idle tiers, (3) implement tiered wandering, (4) implement interaction action icons
